{{Quote|Are you sure this thing is safe?|[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] to [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]|<ref name="Episode 4">{{Film|IV}}</ref>}}
The '''Class-6 [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]]''' was a standard emergency craft created by [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] and used on many of their designs, such as the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:EscapePod_egvv.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Class-6 escape pod [[:Category:Technical drawing images|schematics]].]]

The Class-6 escape pod was equipped with four escape thrusters, and several maneuvering thrusters positioned around the pod.

Each pod could carry up to six individuals and was fitted with a viewscreen connected to externally mounted [[Holocamera/Legends|holocameras]].

The escape pod was designed to accommodate only living passengers.<ref name="EP4NOVEL">[[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope'' novel]]</ref>

==History==
During the [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|first battle of Tatooine]] in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|corvette]] [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] was captured and boarded by the Imperials. Meanwhile, R2-D2 — the [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] onboard, who carried the stolen [[Death Star plans/Legends|plans of the first Death Star]] — overrode a Class-6 escape pod's computer to allow mechanicals to enter. R2-D2 and C-3PO, his [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] companion escaped the beleaguered ''Tantive IV'' in the pod and crash landed on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] with it.<ref name="EP4NOVEL" />

[[File:Search_for_droids_TCG.jpg|thumb|right|280px|[[Desert Sands]], looking for the two droids, find the escape pod on Tatooine.]]
[[Imperial escort carrier (storm commando)|Imperial escort carriers]] utilized by [[Storm commando/Legends|Storm commandos]] also carried Class-6 escape pods, or another escape pod of a similar make.<ref name="Rebel Strike">''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The escape pod model constructed for ''A New Hope'' was built by [[Industrial Light & Magic]] in one week. It was a rush job that consisted of two one-gallon paper paint buckets stuck on top of each other. The top one was truncated, but the bottom one was left whole. [[Lorne Peterson]] was one of the modelmakers involved with this project.

During the Wedge Campaign mission [[Battle of Geonosis (Galactic Civil War)|Relics of Geonosis]], several escape pods were seen ejected from [[Sarkli]] Piett's Imperial escort carrier and littered around on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] that were given a similar design to the Class-6 escape pods, although it was not made clear if they were intended to be Class-6.

[[Star Wars Screen Entertainment|''Star Wars'' Screen Entertainment]] and [[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 31|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 31]] states that the escape pods that appear in {{Film|IV}} are not in fact class-6 escape pods, but are instead [[Faberstien-Lago]] [[37s emergency escape pod]]s; however, this fact has not been repeated in any subsequent source.
